body: currently the failure to execute a git-command like 'git pull' results in an CalledProcessError exception without sensible error message. Errors should be reported in a way that the user immediately can understand what the problem is (e.g. when the SSH key wasn't loaded). No need to parse the git error message, but it neetds to be printed. No exception stack for 'normal' error handling
title: git failures need to be reported sensibly
